0:0 1C1B7,1C06E,1C094
0:6 1C02D


    wait(2);
	needWaitScanline = true;
    waitScanline = 40;
L_01F8E6



    while (true) {
        repeat();
        wait(1);
        myConsole->ppu.signalNMI();
        myConsole->cpu.signal();
    }


    a = 0x00;
    myMapper->writeCPU(0x001B, a);
